note: Vectors from 32 CFR §232.4(c) MLA MAPR. Known constant: 36% MAPR cap (10 USC §987(b)). golden_hash empty until golden-parity --update.

vectors.name: mapr_28pct_within_36pct_cap
vectors.description: Loan $10k 12mo 28% APR + $800 FC + $200 credit insurance: MAPR 28% within 36% MLA cap. Known: 36% cap per 32 CFR §232.4(c).

output_payload.regulatory_basis: 10 USC §987(b); 32 CFR §232.4(c); DoD MLA rule effective Oct 3, 2016
output_payload.table_source: 10 USC §987(b); 32 CFR Part 232 (Federal Register 80 FR 43560 Jul 22 2015, effective Oct 3 2016); 32 CFR §232.4(c)(1)(iii)(A) bona-fide participation fee $100/yr annual exclusion; 32 CFR §232.4(c)(1)(iii)(B) bona-fide application fee exclusion
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted.

vectors.name: mapr_45pct_exceeds_36pct_cap
vectors.description: Loan $10k 12mo 40% APR + $4,500 FC: MAPR 45% EXCEEDS 36% cap -- violation flagged.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: 10 USC §987(b); 32 CFR §232.4(c); DoD MLA rule effective Oct 3, 2016
output_payload.table_source: 10 USC §987(b); 32 CFR Part 232 (Federal Register 80 FR 43560 Jul 22 2015, effective Oct 3 2016); 32 CFR §232.4(c)(1)(iii)(A) bona-fide participation fee $100/yr annual exclusion; 32 CFR §232.4(c)(1)(iii)(B) bona-fide application fee exclusion
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted.

vectors.name: empty_input_finite
vectors.description: Empty inputs return finite zero-state (MAPR 0%, no violation).
